sentences.t: 我喜欢你这样跟我说话。
sentences.en: I like it when you talk to me like that.
sentences.r: Wǒ xǐhuan nǐ zhèyàng gēn wǒ shuōhuà.

sentences.t: 你得从错误里吸取教训。
sentences.en: You have to learn from your mistakes.
sentences.r: Nǐ děi cóng cuòwù lǐ xīqǔ jiàoxun.

sentences.en: You have to trust yourself.
sentences.r: Nǐ děi xiāngxìn zìjǐ.

sentences.en: He said he'd be late again.
sentences.r: Tā shuō tā yòu yào chídào le.

sentences.en: Tell your brother to come.
sentences.r: Ràng nǐ dìdi guòlái.

sentences.en: Why do you say it's no good?
sentences.r: Nǐ wèishénme shuō bùxíng?

sentences.en: You didn't tell me you were coming today.
sentences.r: Nǐ méi gēn wǒ shuō nǐ jīntiān lái.

sentences.t: 你知道她认不认识巴勃罗吗？
sentences.en: Do you know if she knows Pablo?
sentences.r: Nǐ zhīdào tā rèn bu rènshi Bābóluō ma?

sentences.t: 能给我拿一下菜单吗，谢谢。
sentences.en: Can you bring me the menu, please?
sentences.r: Néng gěi wǒ ná yíxià càidān ma, xièxie.

sentences.en: For me, a coffee with milk.
sentences.r: Wǒ yào yì bēi nátiě.

sentences.en: Nobody's home, that's weird.
sentences.r: Jiā lǐ méi rén, zhēn qíguài.

sentences.en: Tell the driver to turn here.
sentences.r: Gēn sījī shuō zài zhèr guǎi.

sentences.en: You're taller than me.
sentences.r: Nǐ bǐ wǒ gāo.

sentences.en: This one is more expensive than that one.
sentences.r: Zhège bǐ nàge guì.

sentences.en: I think it was a good idea.
sentences.r: Wǒ juéde nà shì ge hǎo zhǔyi.

sentences.t: 我以前学得很多，现在学得少了。
sentences.en: I used to study a lot, now I study less.
sentences.r: Wǒ yǐqián xué de hěn duō, xiànzài xué de shǎo le.

sentences.t: 我觉得我昨天做太多事了。
sentences.en: I think I did too many things yesterday.
sentences.r: Wǒ juéde wǒ zuótiān zuò tài duō shì le.

sentences.t: 你能慢点再说一遍吗，谢谢。
sentences.en: Can you say it again more slowly, please?
sentences.r: Nǐ néng màn diǎn zài shuō yí biàn ma, xièxie.

sentences.t: 她哭的时候我不知道该跟她说什么。
sentences.en: I don't know what to say to her when she cries.
sentences.r: Tā kū de shíhou wǒ bù zhīdào gāi gēn tā shuō shénme.

sentences.t: 我看到你消息了，但没回。
sentences.en: I saw your message but I didn't reply.
sentences.r: Wǒ kàndào nǐ xiāoxi le, dàn méi huí.

sentences.t: 我喜欢一样东西的时候就想要更多。
sentences.en: When I like something, I want more.
sentences.r: Wǒ xǐhuan yíyàng dōngxi de shíhou jiù xiǎng yào gèng duō.

sentences.en: I'm from here, but she isn't.
sentences.r: Wǒ shì běndì rén, dàn tā bú shì.

sentences.t: 我不知道怎么回事，但我认识她。
sentences.en: I don't know how, but I know her.
sentences.r: Wǒ bù zhīdào zěnme huí shì, dàn wǒ rènshi tā.

sentences.en: She's from here, like me.
sentences.r: Tā gēn wǒ yíyàng shì běndì rén.

sentences.t: 我在家吃饭，因为我在这儿工作。
sentences.en: I eat at home because I work here.
sentences.r: Wǒ zài jiā chīfàn, yīnwèi wǒ zài zhèr gōngzuò.

sentences.t: 我得睡觉了，我真的太累了。
sentences.en: I have to sleep, I'm really tired.
sentences.r: Wǒ děi shuìjiào le, wǒ zhēn de tài lèi le.

sentences.t: 天冷的时候我不想出门。
sentences.en: When it's cold, I don't want to go out.
sentences.r: Tiān lěng de shíhou wǒ bù xiǎng chūmén.

sentences.en: When I'm tired, I'm not happy.
sentences.r: Wǒ lèi de shíhou jiù bù kāixīn.

sentences.en: I act like nothing's wrong.
sentences.r: Wǒ zhuāngzuò shénme shì dōu méiyǒu.

sentences.t: 我想跟你一起去，但我累了。
sentences.en: I want to go with you, but I'm tired.
sentences.r: Wǒ xiǎng gēn nǐ yìqǐ qù, dàn wǒ lèi le.

sentences.t: 马可总是迟到，但他总会来。
sentences.en: Marco always shows up late, but he shows up.
sentences.r: Marco zǒngshì chídào, dàn tā zǒng huì lái.

sentences.en: No, only you have to come.
sentences.r: Bú yòng, zhǐyǒu nǐ děi lái.

sentences.t: 我赶时间，因为我得工作。
sentences.en: I'm in a hurry because I have to work.
sentences.r: Wǒ gǎn shíjiān, yīnwèi wǒ děi gōngzuò.

sentences.t: 我要是睡不够，就工作不好。
sentences.en: If I don't sleep much, I don't work well.
sentences.r: Wǒ yàoshi shuì bú gòu, jiù gōngzuò bù hǎo.

sentences.en: If it costs a lot, I won't buy it.
sentences.r: Yàoshi tài guì le, wǒ jiù bù mǎi.

sentences.en: When I'm free, I'm happier.
sentences.r: Wǒ yǒu kòng de shíhou gèng kāixīn.

sentences.t: 你愿意的话，我们明天可以一起去。
sentences.en: If you want, we can go together tomorrow.
sentences.r: Nǐ yuànyì de huà, wǒmen míngtiān kěyǐ yìqǐ qù.

sentences.t: 可以，但它一个小时后就开了。
sentences.en: Yes, but it leaves in an hour.
sentences.r: Kěyǐ, dàn tā yí ge xiǎoshí hòu jiù kāi le.

sentences.en: If you're tired, rest a bit.
sentences.r: Nǐ lèi de huà jiù xiūxi yíxià.

sentences.t: 你今天来不了的话，明天来。
sentences.en: If you can't come today, come tomorrow.
sentences.r: Nǐ jīntiān lái bu liǎo de huà, míngtiān lái.

sentences.en: If you don't get it, ask without fear.
sentences.r: Nǐ bù dǒng de huà, dàdǎn de wèn.

sentences.en: I'm lost, but I don't want to ask.
sentences.r: Wǒ mílù le, dàn wǒ bù xiǎng wèn.

sentences.t: 我不是什么都有，但够用了。
sentences.en: I don't have everything, but I have enough.
sentences.r: Wǒ bú shì shénme dōu yǒu, dàn gòu yòng le.

sentences.en: I have to admit you're right.
sentences.r: Wǒ děi chéngrèn nǐ shì duì de.

sentences.en: You have to watch what you eat.
sentences.r: Nǐ děi zhùyì chī de dōngxi.

sentences.en: When I was young, I didn't have money.
sentences.r: Wǒ niánqīng de shíhou méi qián.

sentences.t: 我要是你，就不会那么做。
sentences.en: If I were you, I wouldn't do it.
sentences.r: Wǒ yàoshi nǐ, jiù bú huì nàme zuò.

sentences.t: 我应该给她打电话，但我老是忘。
sentences.en: I should call her, but I always forget.
sentences.r: Wǒ yīnggāi gěi tā dǎ diànhuà, dàn wǒ lǎoshi wàng.

sentences.en: Every time I look at her, I smile.
sentences.r: Wǒ měi cì kàndào tā dōu huì xiào.

sentences.t: 我唱不好，但我还是照唱。
sentences.en: I can't sing, but I sing anyway.
sentences.r: Wǒ chàng bù hǎo, dàn wǒ háishi zhào chàng.

sentences.en: Why don't you like coffee?
sentences.r: Nǐ wèishénme bù xǐhuan kāfēi?

sentences.en: I really like the food here.
sentences.r: Wǒ tèbié xǐhuan zhèr de cài.

sentences.en: You're you and I'm me.
sentences.r: Nǐ shì nǐ, wǒ shì wǒ.

sentences.t: 昨天我做了好多事，今天累了。
sentences.en: Yesterday I did a lot and today I'm tired.
sentences.r: Zuótiān wǒ zuò le hǎoduō shì, jīntiān lèi le.

sentences.en: This guy here is my friend Carlos.
sentences.r: Zhè wèi shì wǒ péngyou Kǎluòsī.

sentences.en: After work I'm going to your place.
sentences.r: Xiàbān hòu wǒ qù nǐ jiā.

sentences.en: The dog's under the bed.
sentences.r: Gǒu zài chuáng dǐxia.

sentences.en: There's a dog under the bed.
sentences.r: Chuáng dǐxia yǒu zhī gǒu.

sentences.en: My brother is busy with work.
sentences.r: Wǒ gē máng gōngzuò.

sentences.t: 钥匙总是压在什么东西底下。
sentences.en: The keys are always under something.
sentences.r: Yàoshi zǒngshì yā zài shénme dōngxi dǐxia.

sentences.en: My keys aren't on the table.
sentences.r: Wǒ yàoshi bú zài zhuō shàng.

sentences.en: My name is Ana and I'm from Mexico.
sentences.r: Wǒ jiào Ānnà, Mòxīgē rén.

sentences.en: The cat's under the table.
sentences.r: Māo zài zhuōzi dǐxia.

sentences.en: I like tea more.
sentences.r: Wǒ gèng xǐhuan chá.

sentences.en: Turn right and it's right there.
sentences.r: Wǎng yòu guǎi jiù dào le.

sentences.en: Go right and keep straight.
sentences.r: Wǎng yòu zǒu ránhòu zhí zǒu.

sentences.t: 你叫什么名字，是哪里人？
sentences.en: What's your name and where are you from?
sentences.r: Nǐ jiào shénme míngzi, shì nǎlǐ rén?

sentences.t: 告诉我这个西班牙语怎么说。
sentences.en: Tell me how you say this in Spanish.
sentences.r: Gàosu wǒ zhège Xībānyáyǔ zěnme shuō.

sentences.en: She's next to the window.
sentences.r: Tā zài chuānghu pángbiān.

sentences.t: 除了周日我每天都工作。
sentences.en: I work every day except Sunday.
sentences.r: Chúle zhōurì wǒ měitiān dōu gōngzuò.

sentences.en: I'm going out for a little walk.
sentences.r: Wǒ chūqù zǒu yì xiǎo huìr.

sentences.en: I'd like to have more time to read.
sentences.r: Wǒ xiǎng yǒu gèng duō shíjiān kànshū.

sentences.en: I'll pay you back everything next week.
sentences.r: Wǒ xià zhōu bǎ qián dōu huán gěi nǐ.

sentences.en: She asked me what I meant by that.
sentences.r: Tā wèn wǒ nà shì shénme yìsi.

sentences.t: 我在找一个词，怎么也想不起来。
sentences.en: I'm looking for a word and I can't find it.
sentences.r: Wǒ zài zhǎo yí ge cí, zěnme yě xiǎng bu qǐlái.

sentences.t: 我想给我妈买点好东西。
sentences.en: I want to buy something nice for my mom.
sentences.r: Wǒ xiǎng gěi wǒ mā mǎi diǎn hǎo dōngxi.

sentences.t: 我在这套公寓住两年了。
sentences.en: I've been living in this apartment for two years.
sentences.r: Wǒ zài zhè tào gōngyù zhù liǎng nián le.

sentences.en: I'm tired and my back hurts.
sentences.r: Wǒ lèi le, bèi hái téng.

sentences.en: I have a cough and my throat hurts.
sentences.r: Wǒ késòu, sǎngzi yě téng.

sentences.en: My friends like music.
sentences.r: Wǒ péngyoumen xǐhuan yīnyuè.

sentences.en: People like to feel good.
sentences.r: Rén dōu xǐhuan gǎnjué hǎo.

sentences.t: 别告诉任何人我在哪儿。
sentences.en: Don't tell anyone where I am.
sentences.r: Bié gàosu rènhé rén wǒ zài nǎr.

sentences.t: 我跟你说我的看法：别做。
sentences.en: I'll give you my opinion: don't do it.
sentences.r: Wǒ gēn nǐ shuō wǒ de kànfǎ: bié zuò.

sentences.t: 我找到了个更简单的办法。
sentences.en: I found an easier way to do it.
sentences.r: Wǒ zhǎodào le ge gèng jiǎndān de bànfǎ.

sentences.en: I always study a bit before going to bed.
sentences.r: Wǒ shuì qián zǒng huì xué yíhuìr.

sentences.t: 我点太多了，现在吃不下了。
sentences.en: I ordered too much and now I can't eat anymore.
sentences.r: Wǒ diǎn tài duō le, xiànzài chī bu xià le.

sentences.en: The remote's next to the couch.
sentences.r: Yáokòngqì zài shāfā pángbiān.

sentences.en: The phone's ringing in my room.
sentences.r: Wǒ fángjiān lǐ diànhuà zài xiǎng.

sentences.en: I have a doctor's appointment on Tuesday.
sentences.r: Wǒ zhōu'èr yǒu ge yīshēng yùyuē.

sentences.en: I don't see the exit anywhere.
sentences.r: Wǒ nǎr dōu zhǎo bu dào chūkǒu.

sentences.t: 他们给大家看了旅行的照片。
sentences.en: They showed everyone the photos from the trip.
sentences.r: Tāmen gěi dàjiā kàn le lǚxíng de zhàopiàn.

sentences.t: 我昨天买的，现在就坏了。
sentences.en: I bought this yesterday and it's already broken.
sentences.r: Wǒ zuótiān mǎi de, xiànzài jiù huài le.

sentences.t: 昨天我去超市买了好多东西。
sentences.en: Yesterday I went to the supermarket and bought a lot.
sentences.r: Zuótiān wǒ qù chāoshì mǎi le hǎoduō dōngxi.
